zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Walwyn於1395年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾姆 馬可爾時，她的父親Thomas Walwyn31歲，母親Lady Catherine de Harrock49歲。她於1418年與Sir William Croft在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1439年在英國英格蘭賀福爾卡芙特 安布享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾卡芙特。

nameMeanings.name: Walwyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Wal(d)wine, which is of ancient Germanic origin, from elements meaning ‘power’ + ‘friend’.

from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Walweyn, Walwain. The central French form of this name is Gawain (see Gavin ). This name is found in the medieval Arthurian romances and is traditionally explained as an adaptation of the Welsh name Gwalchmei, perhaps meaning ‘hawk of the plain’.

variants.name: Gavin
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gábháin or Ó Gáibhín, both of which are derived from diminutives of gábhadh ‘want’ or ‘danger’ (the second being the more likely meaning here).

Scottish and northern English: from the personal name Gavin, Scottish form of English Gawain and French Gauvain . The name was introduced into English from French versions of the Arthurian romances, where this name was borne by one of the knights of the Round Table, brother of Galahad and Mordred and a nephew of Arthur. It has been taken to be an adaptation of the Welsh name Gwalchmei, perhaps ‘hawk of the plain’.
Scottish: shortened form of McGavin , which is believed to be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gobhann ‘son of the smith’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Walwyn was born in 1395, in Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Walwyn, was 31 and her mother, Lady Catherine de Harrock, was 49. She married Sir William Croft in 1418, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1439, in Croft Ambrey, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Croft, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Walwyn est née en 1395, à Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Walwyn, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine de Harrock, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Croft en 1418, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1439, à Croft Ambrey, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Croft, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Walwynが1395年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアムチ マルクルで生まれた時，父Thomas Walwynは31歳，母Lady Catherine de Harrockは49歳であった。1418年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでSir William Croftと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1439年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクロフト アンブリーで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクロフトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Walwyn(이)가 1395년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 무치 마클에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Walwyn(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Catherine de Harrock(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1418년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Sir William Croft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 크로프트 아브리에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 크로프트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Walwyn родилась в 1395 г. в местности муч маркл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Walwyn было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine de Harrock, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Croft в 1418 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1439 г. в местности крофт эмбри, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности крофт, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Walwyn nació en 1395, en Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Walwyn, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Catherine de Harrock, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Sir William Croft en 1418, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1439, en Croft Ambrey, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Croft, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
